combinations.name: Microservices + Event-Driven Architecture
combinations.synergy: Microservices handles service boundaries and independent deployment; Event-Driven decouples inter-service communication and handles async workflows.
combinations.synergy_zh: 微服务负责服务边界和独立部署；事件驱动解耦服务间通信并处理异步工作流。
combinations.topology_mermaid:
graph LR
A[API网关] --> B[用户服务]
A --> C[订单服务]
B --> D[(事件总线)]
C --> D
D --> E[通知服务]
D --> F[审计服务]
B --> G[(用户DB)]
C --> H[(订单DB)]

combinations.name: Layered Architecture + CQRS
best_for_zh: 读写不均衡的企业应用
combinations.synergy: Layered provides clear domain boundaries; CQRS splits read/write models to optimize query performance while keeping commands consistent.
combinations.synergy_zh: 分层架构提供清晰的领域边界；CQRS 分离读写模型，在保持命令一致性的同时优化查询性能。
combinations.topology_mermaid:
graph LR
A[表现层] --> B[应用层]
B --> C[命令API]
B --> D[查询API]
C --> E[(写数据库)]
D --> F[(读数据库)]
E -.事件同步.-> F

combinations.name: Pipeline-Filter + Event-Driven Architecture
combinations.name_zh: 管道-过滤器 + 事件驱动
combinations.synergy: Pipeline-Filter structures data processing stages; Event-Driven triggers pipeline stages asynchronously for high-throughput streaming.
combinations.synergy_zh: 管道-过滤器结构化数据处理阶段；事件驱动异步触发各阶段，实现高吞吐流处理。
combinations.topology_mermaid:
graph LR
A[数据源] --> B[(事件总线)]
B --> C[过滤器:解析]
C --> D[过滤器:验证]
D --> E[过滤器:转换]
E --> F[过滤器:聚合]
F --> G[数据汇]

combinations.name: Hexagonal Architecture + Microservices
combinations.name_zh: 六边形架构 + 微服务
best_for_zh: 高可测试性分布式系统
combinations.synergy: Hexagonal ensures clean port-adapter separation within each service; Microservices manages cross-service boundaries and independent deployment.
combinations.synergy_zh: 六边形架构确保每个服务内部端口-适配器清晰分离；微服务管理跨服务边界和独立部署。
combinations.topology_mermaid:
graph LR
A[Web适配器] --> B[端口]
B --> C[领域核心]
C --> D[数据库端口]
D --> E[(服务DB)]
F[消息适配器] --> B
G[API网关] -.路由.-> A

combinations.name: CQRS + Event Sourcing
combinations.synergy: CQRS separates command and query models; Event Sourcing records all state changes as events, enabling full audit trail and temporal queries.
combinations.synergy_zh: CQRS 分离命令与查询模型；事件溯源将所有状态变更记录为事件，实现完整审计追踪和时间旅行查询。
combinations.topology_mermaid:
graph LR
A[客户端] --> B[命令API]
A --> C[查询API]
B --> D[(事件存储)]
D --> E[事件处理器]
E --> F[(读模型)]
C --> F
D -.重放.-> E

combinations.name: Batch-Sequential + Pipeline-Filter
combinations.name_zh: 批处理 + 管道-过滤器
combinations.synergy: Batch-Sequential handles offline ETL and scheduled reports; Pipeline-Filter processes real-time streaming data. Together they cover the full data processing spectrum.
combinations.synergy_zh: 批处理负责离线 ETL 和定时报表；管道-过滤器处理实时流式数据，二者覆盖数据处理全频谱。
combinations.topology_mermaid:
graph LR
A[数据源] --> B[批处理管道]
B --> C[(数据仓库)]
A --> D[实时管道]
D --> E[(实时存储)]
C --> F[BI 报表]
E --> G[实时监控]

combinations.name: Object-Oriented + Hexagonal Architecture
combinations.name_zh: 面向对象 + 六边形架构
combinations.synergy: Object-Oriented models the domain core with rich behavior; Hexagonal wraps it with clean port-adapter boundaries, isolating infrastructure concerns.
combinations.synergy_zh: 面向对象建模领域核心的丰富行为；六边形架构用端口-适配器隔离基础设施，实现 DDD 最佳实践。
combinations.topology_mermaid:
graph TB
A[Web适配器] --> B[领域端口]
B --> C[OO领域模型]
C --> D[持久化端口]
D --> E[(数据库)]
F[消息适配器] --> B
C -.领域事件.-> G[事件总线]

combinations.name: Rule-Based + Microservices
combinations.synergy: Rule-Based extracts business rules into a standalone service with hot-reload; Microservices provides independent deployment and scaling for rule execution.
combinations.synergy_zh: 规则系统将业务规则抽取为独立服务并支持热更新；微服务提供独立部署和弹性伸缩能力。
combinations.topology_mermaid:
graph LR
A[API网关] --> B[业务服务]
A --> C[规则引擎服务]
B --> C
C --> D[(规则库)]
C -.规则更新.-> D
B --> E[(业务DB)]
